name: Ransomware: Maze Suspicious File Transfer
notes:
This rule triggers when a file transfer associated with Maze ransomware data exfiltration is detected. 
The ransomware is known to create a text file (2.txt) containing outputs of nslookup commands, and an archive named ad.7z containing network and users information before proceeding to their exfiltration.
conditions_text: when the destination is Remote
when the flow matches Application is DataTransfer.FTP
when the flow matches File Name is any of [2.txt or ad.7z]
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Maze Suspicious File Transfer on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination is Remote
AND when the flow matches Application is DataTransfer.FTP
AND when the flow matches File Name is any of [2.txt or ad.7z]
RED_list: Event name: Maze IOC Detected - File Exfiltration
Event description: An IOC (Filename) related to Maze Ransomware has been observed during it's exfiltration.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
